title: pyxidaria sphaerocarpa
intro: Pyxidaria sphaerocarpa, also known as the "ball-bearing fungus," is a type of subterranean fungus that belongs to the family Pyxidariaceae. This fungus has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pyxidaria sphaerocarpa are said to include the treatment of various ailments such as skin infections, wounds, and even certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the fungus is often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used in teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
